# run_beam_strategy_optimizer.py

<!-- Generated by scripts/docs/generate_api_docs.py. Do not edit manually. -->

## Purpose

Run backend-agnostic beam search strategy optimizer over legal HybridStrategySpec candidates.

## CLI usage

```bash
python scripts/optimize/run_beam_strategy_optimizer.py --mode analytical
```

## CLI options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Choices | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| --beam-width | int | 10 | False |  |  |
| --cache-dir | Path | Path('work') / 'fixture_bank' / 'evaluations' | False |  |  |
| --cache-enabled | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --families | str | majority pyramid horizontal vertical | False | majority pyramid horizontal vertical |  |
| --force-recompute | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --generations | int | 5 | False |  |  |
| --json-output | Path | None | False |  |  |
| --k-box-values | int | 1 3 7 | False |  |  |
| --mode | str |  | True | analytical dense_exhaustive dense_mc procedural_mc |  |
| --mutations-per-candidate | int | 5 | False |  |  |
| --n2-values | int | 4 8 | False |  |  |
| --p-rule | float | 0.8 | False |  |  |
| --persist-analytical | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --quiet | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --seed | int | 0 | False |  |  |
| --top-k | int | 10 | False |  |  |
